title: Revised Baby Mobs
description: Breathes life back into select baby mobs + fixes helmet for baby humanoid monsters
body:
### ◆ Revised Baby Mobs
- - -

Bridges the gap between the modern baby mob designs and classic designs. The fix? Two white pixels, ears, and eyebrows! In addition, fixes the odd shape of helmets when worn by baby hostile monsters.

- - -
Includes:
- Pigs, Sheep, Cows, Wolves, Cats, Mooshrooms, Ocelot, Foxes, Donkey, Mule, Llamas, Polar Bear, Dolphin, Strider, Hoglin, and Zoglin textures
- - -
Unchanged:
- Chick, Goat, Horse, Panda, Nautilus and Turtle textures
- - -
![Revised baby pig, sheep, and cow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48d04d4c731c2f92a93a864646b9495e30140804_0.webp)
